evaluations.query: My memory files have piled up over many sessions — clean them up
expected_behavior: Prunes stale entries, merges duplicates, and resolves contradictions across memory files
Rebuilds the MEMORY.md index after consolidation
Operates on accumulated memory, not on a single new fact

evaluations.query: Run consolidation when one stale-looking memory is still referenced by a recent session
expected_behavior: Applies the consult-gate and does not prune a memory that is still being used
Distinguishes truly-orphaned entries from referenced ones before deleting

evaluations.query: Remember that we chose cursor-based pagination for the feed
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is storing a new decision, not consolidating existing memory
Routes to /ork:remember instead of running the dream consolidation

evaluations.query: What did we decide about the auth token rotation?
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is a memory search, not a cleanup task
Routes to /ork:memory rather than invoking consolidation
